title: Rand (BFF-1 bulk freighter)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] freighter|[[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] frigate}}
'''''Rand''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Along with [[Talli]], it was part of [[Operation Grain Snatch]]. Their role was to swap the fresh [[Grain/Legends|grain]] belonging to the convoy with poisoned grain. The operation was a success.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
